'''zadhuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placenta|placenta]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-dh-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placenta|placenta]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zadhuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zædhirith|zædhirith]] || [[word:zædhirij|zædhirij]] || [[word:zædhirish|zædhirish]] || [[word:zædhiri|zædhiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zadhudhuruth|zadhudhuruth]] || [[word:zadhudhuruj|zadhudhuruj]] || [[word:zadhudhurush|zadhudhurush]] || [[word:zadhudhuru|zadhudhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zadhuruth|zadhuruth]] || [[word:zadhuruj|zadhuruj]] || [[word:zadhurush|zadhurush]] || [[word:zadhuru|zadhuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zadhufruth|zadhufruth]] || [[word:zadhufruj|zadhufruj]] || [[word:zadhufrush|zadhufrush]] || [[word:zadhufruf|zadhufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zadhuruthu|zadhuruthu]] || [[word:zadhuruju|zadhuruju]] || [[word:zadhurushu|zadhurushu]] || [[word:zadhuruku|zadhuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zadhuruth|zadhuruth]] || [[word:zadhuruj|zadhuruj]] || [[word:zadhurush|zadhurush]] || [[word:zadhuru|zadhuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zadhuruthul|zadhuruthul]] || [[word:zadhurujul|zadhurujul]] || [[word:zadhurushul|zadhurushul]] || [[word:zadhurukul|zadhurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zadhuruthuthu|zadhuruthuthu]] || [[word:zadhurujuju|zadhurujuju]] || [[word:zadhurushushu|zadhurushushu]] || [[word:zadhuruku|zadhuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zadhuruthun|zadhuruthun]] || [[word:zadhurujun|zadhurujun]] || [[word:zadhurushun|zadhurushun]] || [[word:zadhurukun|zadhurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zadhuruthuoro|zadhuruthuoro]] || [[word:zadhurujuoro|zadhurujuoro]] || [[word:zadhurushuoro|zadhurushuoro]] || [[word:zadhurukuoro|zadhurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
